# Data validation: split category distribution per patient

Compare LOW/MID/HIGH counts per patient across split methods (`SPLIT_SOURCE` in config).

Set `CATEGORY_QC_RUN_PER_SOURCE` / `CATEGORY_QC_RUN_COMPARISON` in [config/hnsc_preprocess_checks.R](../config/hnsc_preprocess_checks.R), or run only the chunk you need below (after setup).

```{r split-category-per-patient, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, eval=CATEGORY_QC_RUN_PER_SOURCE}
dir.create(CATEGORY_QC_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

for (ds in DATASETS) {
  message("\n=== Category distribution (per patient): ", ds, " ===")

  for (src in split_sources) {
    base_dir <- SPLIT_BASE_DIRS[[src]]
    source_label <- split_source_labels[[src]]
    message("  Source: ", src, " (", source_label, ")")

    long_df <- read_grouped_splits_long(base_dir, ds)
    if (is.null(long_df)) {
      message("  No grouped .rds under ", file.path(base_dir, ds), " — skipping.")
      next
    }

    count_df <- summarize_category_counts(long_df)

    p <- plot_split_category_per_patient(count_df, ds, source_label)
    print(p)

    out_png <- file.path(CATEGORY_QC_DIR, paste0(ds, "_", src, "_split_category_per_patient.png"))
    ggplot2::ggsave(out_png, p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
    message("  Saved: ", out_png)
  }
}
```

```{r split-category-comparison-facets, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, eval=CATEGORY_QC_RUN_COMPARISON}
dir.create(CATEGORY_QC_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

for (ds in DATASETS) {
  message("\n=== Category distribution (comparison facets): ", ds, " ===")
  comparison_counts <- collect_category_counts_by_source(ds)
  save_split_category_comparison(ds, comparison_counts)
}
```
